surfaceStrategies.hero: Dark background with subtle green glow. Use abstract background image overlay with bg-black/60.
surfaceStrategies.cards: Glassmorphism: bg-white/5 backdrop-blur-xl border border-white/10 hover:border-[#00FF66]/50 shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(0,255,102,0.05)]
surfaceStrategies.nav: Sticky header with Crystal Glass: bg-black/60 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-white/10
surfaceStrategies.footer: Solid deep black #050505 with generous py-20 padding.

animations.hover: Subtle lift (-translate-y-1), border color changes to neon green, shadow increases.
animations.entrance: Framer Motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> 1).
animations.glow: Pulsing neon green drop-shadow on primary CTA.

icons.library: lucide-react for UI icons, react-icons/si for brand logos (SiSpotify, SiNetflix, SiYoutube)

images.description: Abstract 3D glassmorphism dark background with subtle neon green light leaks
Dark mode server room / tech vault with green neon

components.nav: Logo (StreamVault text with a green glow), Nav links (Home, Subscriptions, Why Us, FAQ), Cart Button (Lucide icon, with item count badge). Fixed top.
components.hero: H1: 'Unlock Premium Streaming for Less'. Subtitle: 'Get uninterrupted access to top-tier digital services at a fraction of the cost.' Primary CTA: 'View Subscriptions' (Solid neon green button, black text). Secondary CTA: 'How it works' (Outline). Use hero_background image.
components.subscriptions: Bento Grid or Flex Wrap. 3 Cards: Spotify Premium, Netflix, YouTube Premium. Use SiSpotify, SiNetflix, SiYoutube. Include Pricing, Features list, and a glowing 'Buy Now' button. Card surface should be glassmorphism.
components.why_choose_us: 3-column grid. Icons: ShieldCheck (Secure Payments), Zap (Instant Delivery), Clock (24/7 Support). Dark cards on a subtle features_background image.
components.testimonials: Carousel or grid of 3 reviews. Use avatar images. 5-star ratings.
components.faq: Shadcn Accordion component customized for dark mode. No background, just bottom borders.
components.cart_drawer: Slide-in panel (Shadcn Sheet) showing selected items. Total price. 'Proceed to Checkout' button.
components.checkout_mock: A simple page or modal showing order summary and a 'Complete Purchase' button leading to a success state/toast. No login required.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure all interactive elements have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='buy-now-spotify').
Use framer-motion for smooth entrance animations on sections and cards.
Use react-icons/si for the brand logos (Spotify, Netflix, YouTube) and lucide-react for standard UI icons.
Do not implement real auth/login, keep it a mock shop experience.
Do not add a WhatsApp button.
Use standard Tailwind classes for neon glows (e.g., shadow-[0_0_15px_#00FF66]).
Install necessary packages: yarn add react-icons framer-motion
Keep text contrast high: use off-white text over the dark background.
